description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular metal head with flat striking faces on both ends. The head is solid and dark in color, likely made of forged steel, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of wood, with a subtle reddish-brown hue and a smooth cylindrical profile. The handle is securely fitted into the head, providing leverage and control for heavy-duty tasks. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on the hammer. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no signs of wear or damage, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a solid rectangular steel head and a long, straight wooden handle. The design is simple, functional, and free of visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat face of the rectangular metal head and the full length of the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite flat face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow edge of the head and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth, with a reddish-brown finish and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head, solid steel, with flat striking faces on both ends and no claws or peens.
